calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Seal Name And Gender Change Petition And Corresponding Papers; Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Michaela Ann Murray
Off Calendar Jan-08-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for request to change name and gender, for motion to Seal Name and Gender Change Petition and Corresponding documents.

Dept.505: Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Bailiffs: Deputy Gomez and Deputy Jones; Not Reported.(D505)

Appearance made by Petitioner Michaela Ann Murray, in pro per.

No objections received by the court.

Upon review of the declaration and having no objections. The Court GRANTS the request to change name and gender of petitioner.

Good cause appearing, the Court GRANTS the request to Seal Name and Gender Change Petition and Corresponding documents.

Proposed orders signed and filed.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Seal Name And Gender Change Petition And Corresponding Papers; Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Michaela Ann Murray
Off Calendar Jan-03-2025 Continued To Jan-08-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
